The following events took place in '''553 BBY'''.

==Events==
*The [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Osted Picutorion]] marries [[Farasa Anturi]], the deranged [[Prince/Legends|princess]] of the weakest [[Senex/Legends|Senex]] house, instigating a conflict that would became known as the [[Crimson Days]]. Picutorion defeats the combined forces of [[House Vandron]] and [[House Petro]], frees the [[Hutlarian]]s from [[Slavery/Legends|servitude]], and occupies [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
